productDisplayName: Puma Men Metamostro Grey & Purple Shoes
description: The Metamostro kicks from puma are the label's reinterpretation of a fashion sneaker. True to their classic style the shoe is neatly silhouetted with sleek patterning and one bold detail: criss-crossing purple straps.UpperSynthetic upper with a blunt toe cupFabric strap across the midfoot with a Velcro closureSuede formstripe at the lateral sideBrand name embossed on the heel guardBreathable fabric lining and a cushioned foot-bed for all-day comfort.MidsolePU midsole to offer support and ample cushioningOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with circular nubs all overShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
